Comment: A full list of IPv4 multicast assignments can be found at:
Comment: 
Comment: http://www.iana.org/assignments/multicast-addresses
Comment: 
Comment: A document describing the policies for assigning multicast addresses can be found at:

attributes.magic: Unicode text, UTF-8 (with BOM) text, with CRLF line terminators

crowdsourced_ai_results.analysis: The code snippet is a Cascading Style Sheet (CSS) file defining styles for HTML elements.  It sets styles for various HTML elements like `body`, `a` (anchor links), headings (h1 to h5), lists (`ul`, `ol`), and other custom classes such as `.actionIcon` and `.infoBlock`.  The styles control aspects like font, background, color, margins, and padding.  The code includes conditional styles based on CSS classes like `securityError` and `tabInfo`, altering the background image and color.  There are no remote file downloads or executable code present. The CSS uses local image files (`background_gradient.jpg`, `background_gradient_red.jpg`) for background styling.
